description:
Implement `hx-stack` (T3 tier) — 2/6 libraries ship this. Flexbox layout wrapper for consistent vertical/horizontal spacing between children.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-stack/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-stack.ts`, `hx-stack.styles.ts`, `hx-stack.stories.ts`, `hx-stack.test.ts`

**Props:** `direction` (`horizontal`|`vertical`, default `vertical`), `gap` (`none`|`xs`|`sm`|`md`|`lg`|`xl`), `align` (`start`|`center`|`end`|`stretch`|`baseline`), `justify` (`start`|`center`|`end`|`between`|`around`|`evenly`), `wrap` (boolean), `inline` (boolean — `display: inline-flex`)

**Slots:** default (any children)

**CSS Parts:** `base`

**ARIA:** `role="presentation"` — layout utility only.

**Implementation:** Maps props to CSS flexbox properties. Uses `--hx-spacing-*` tokens for gap values.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (direction, gap, alignment), axe-core zero violations, Storybook with vertical/horizontal/centered/between demos, bundle < 2KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-stack — T3 Flexbox Stack Layout Component
